content:
<@1131790839291596841> 鉴于频道全球玩家都不少，希望关于有关更新、活动等时间的格式可以利用discord的时区自动转换功能。比如这样：<t:1753663635:F>
这样每个用户看到的都会是自己的本地时区。具体方法可以搜索“discord timestamp”

Since we have a lot of global players in the channel, It would be a good idea to utilize the discord timestamp function to auto convert dates information for events, updates .etc
Like this: <t:1753663635:F>
So that every user can see the dates in their local time zone. 
Just search "discord timestamp" for methods.
https://sesh.fyi/timestamp/ 像有这种网站可以复制相应的日期代码。另外有一些bot也会自带这个功能。

embeds.title: Timestamp Converter - sesh.fyi
embeds.description: Automatically convert times and dates to the Discord timestamp format to display times in everyone's local timezone.

content: https://hammertime.cyou/zh <----这里有一个中文的转换站

embeds.title: HammerTime
embeds.description: 为 Discord 聊天消息生成时间戳
